_comment: Declarative live trout-stocking feed registry consumed by stocking.py. One entry per agency layer; a state may declare several (lakes + reaches). Every `url` was verified against the live endpoint when added (layer metadata + returnCountOnly + a real f=geojson sample). Field options per source: `name_field` (water name column), `species_field` (free-text species column) or `species_flags` (map of 0/1 flag columns -> species label, VA style), `category` (fixed label shown in the popup), `category_from_props` (prefer the feed's own category column when present), `season_months` ([start, end] fixed stocking season when the feed carries none), `dedupe` (collapse multi-segment polyline reach layers to one pin per named water per ~0.1 deg cell). The loader centroids non-point geometry and degrades to the bundled baseline when an endpoint is unreachable.
